name: Potato Pancakes,latkes
recipeInstructions:
1. Peel and grate the potatoes.
2. Drain off half the liquid from the grated potatoes.
3. Add the egg, salt, pepper, flour, grated onion, and baking powder to the potatoes. Mix well.
4. Drop spoonfuls of the mixture into very hot oil (475°F) in a skillet.
5. Brown both sides thoroughly.
6. Serve with apple sauce.
7. These will yield about 100 pancakes measuring 2 inches in diameter each. Larger portions can be made by using larger amounts, resulting in fewer but still crispy and delicious pancakes.
